api_key.description: PayFit partner API key. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: PayFit API base URL override. Defaults to the current root host; legacy streams use /v1 paths explicitly.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

max_results.description: Records per page for current company-scoped PayFit endpoints (maxResults, max 50).

company_id.description: PayFit company ID used by company-scoped current API endpoints. Discover it with the documented oauth.payfit.com/introspect helper outside this connector.

collaborator_id.description: Collaborator ID for detail streams and contract creation.

contract_id.description: Contract ID for detail streams and contract-scoped writes.

document_id.description: Document ID for binary document download endpoints, which are excluded from streams.

payslip_id.description: Payslip ID for binary payslip download endpoints, which are excluded from streams.

pay_period.description: YYYYMM pay period/date value required by PayFit accounting, worked-time, payroll-status, and meal-voucher endpoints.
